<!-- Academicons + embeds -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jpswalsh/academicons@1/css/academicons.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">

<script type="text/javascript" src="https://d1bxh8uas1mnw7.cloudfront.net/assets/embed.js"></script>
<script async src="https://badge.dimensions.ai/badge.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.plu.mx/widget-popup.js"></script>

<div id="welcome-splash" class="welcome-splash" hidden aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="welcome-splash__backdrop"></div>
  <div class="welcome-splash__glow" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="welcome-splash__content">
    <h1
      class="welcome-splash__headline"
      data-headline-en="WELCOME"
      data-headline-es="BIENVENIDO"
    >WELCOME</h1>
    <p
      class="welcome-splash__tagline"
      data-tagline-en="to Matías Deneken's web profile"
      data-tagline-es="al sitio web y perfil de Matías Deneken"
    ></p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  function applyThemeClasses(theme) {
    var isDark = theme === "dark";
    var root = document.documentElement;
    root.setAttribute("data-theme", theme);
    root.setAttribute("data-bs-theme", theme);
    root.classList.toggle("quarto-dark", isDark);
    if (document.body) {
      document.body.classList.toggle("quarto-dark", isDark);
    }
    var bsSheet = document.getElementById("quarto-bootstrap");
    if (bsSheet) {
      bsSheet.setAttribute("data-mode", theme);
    }
  }

  try {
    var saved = localStorage.getItem("site-theme");
    var theme = saved === "dark" || saved === "light" ? saved : "light";
    applyThemeClasses(theme);
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
      applyThemeClasses(localStorage.getItem("site-theme") || "light");
    });
  } catch (e) {
    applyThemeClasses("light");
  }

  window.applyThemeClasses = applyThemeClasses;
})();
</script>

<script>
window.switchTheme = function (theme) {
  localStorage.setItem("site-theme", theme);
  if (window.applyThemeClasses) {
    window.applyThemeClasses(theme);
  }
  window.updateThemeToggleButton(theme);
};

window.toggleTheme = function () {
  var current = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme") || "light";
  window.switchTheme(current === "dark" ? "light" : "dark");
};

window.updateThemeToggleButton = function (theme) {
  var btn = document.getElementById("theme-toggle");
  if (!btn) return;
  var isDark = theme === "dark";
  btn.textContent = isDark ? "☀" : "☾";
  btn.setAttribute("aria-label", isDark ? "Activar modo día" : "Activar modo noche");
  btn.setAttribute("title", isDark ? "Modo día" : "Modo noche");
  btn.setAttribute("aria-pressed", isDark ? "true" : "false");
  btn.classList.toggle("is-dark", isDark);
};

window.switchLanguage = function (lang) {
  localStorage.setItem("site-lang", lang);
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-lang]").forEach(function (el) {
    el.style.display = el.getAttribute("data-lang") === lang ? "" : "none";
  });

  var enBtn = document.getElementById("lang-en");
  var esBtn = document.getElementById("lang-es");
  if (enBtn && esBtn) {
    enBtn.classList.toggle("active", lang === "en");
    esBtn.classList.toggle("active", lang === "es");
  }

  document.querySelectorAll("[data-nav-en]").forEach(function (el) {
    var en = el.getAttribute("data-nav-en");
    var es = el.getAttribute("data-nav-es");
    if (en && es) {
      el.textContent = lang === "es" ? es : en;
    }
  });

  var vincLink = document.querySelector('.navbar a.nav-link[href*="vinculacion"]');
  if (vincLink) {
    var vincText = vincLink.querySelector(".menu-text");
    if (vincText) {
      vincText.textContent = lang === "es" ? "Vinculación" : "Outreach";
    }
  }
};

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var savedLang = localStorage.getItem("site-lang") || "en";
  var savedTheme = localStorage.getItem("site-theme") || "light";
  var navbar = document.querySelector(".navbar");
  var cvLink = document.querySelector('.navbar a.nav-link[href*="Deneken_CV"]');
  var cvLi = cvLink ? cvLink.closest("li") : null;

  var themeSwitcher = document.getElementById("theme-switcher");
  if (!themeSwitcher) {
    themeSwitcher = document.createElement("div");
    themeSwitcher.id = "theme-switcher";
    themeSwitcher.innerHTML =
      '<button id="theme-toggle" class="theme-toggle-btn" type="button" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Activar modo noche" title="Modo noche">☾</button>';
  }

  var langSwitcher = document.getElementById("language-switcher");
  if (!langSwitcher) {
    langSwitcher = document.createElement("div");
    langSwitcher.id = "language-switcher";
    langSwitcher.innerHTML =
      '<button id="lang-en" class="lang-btn" type="button">EN</button>' +
      '<button id="lang-es" class="lang-btn" type="button">ES</button>';
  }

  if (cvLi) {
    if (!themeSwitcher.closest("li")) {
      var themeWrap = document.createElement("li");
      themeWrap.className = "nav-item";
      themeWrap.appendChild(themeSwitcher);
      cvLi.parentNode.insertBefore(themeWrap, cvLi.nextSibling);
    }
    if (!langSwitcher.closest("li")) {
      var langWrap = document.createElement("li");
      langWrap.className = "nav-item";
      langWrap.appendChild(langSwitcher);
      var themeLi = themeSwitcher.closest("li");
      themeLi.parentNode.insertBefore(langWrap, themeLi.nextSibling);
    }
  }

  document.getElementById("theme-toggle").onclick = function () {
    window.toggleTheme();
  };
  document.getElementById("lang-en").onclick = function () {
    window.switchLanguage("en");
  };
  document.getElementById("lang-es").onclick = function () {
    window.switchLanguage("es");
  };

  function updateNavbarState() {
    if (!navbar) return;
    var isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme") === "dark";
    if (window.scrollY > 20) {
      navbar.style.boxShadow = isDark
        ? "0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"
        : "0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06)";
    } else {
      navbar.style.boxShadow = "none";
    }
  }

  updateNavbarState();
  window.addEventListener("scroll", updateNavbarState, { passive: true });
  window.switchTheme(savedTheme);
  window.updateThemeToggleButton(savedTheme);
  window.switchLanguage(savedLang);

  function initWelcomeSplash() {
    if (sessionStorage.getItem("welcome-seen")) return;
    if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) {
      sessionStorage.setItem("welcome-seen", "1");
      return;
    }

    var splash = document.getElementById("welcome-splash");
    if (!splash) return;

    var lang = localStorage.getItem("site-lang") || "en";
    var headlineEl = splash.querySelector(".welcome-splash__headline");
    var taglineEl = splash.querySelector(".welcome-splash__tagline");

    function animateLetters(el, text) {
      el.innerHTML = text
        .split("")
        .map(function (ch, i) {
          var display = ch === " " ? "\u00a0" : ch;
          var extra =
            ch === " " ? " welcome-splash__letter--space" : "";
          return (
            '<span class="welcome-splash__letter' +
            extra +
            '" style="animation-delay:' +
            (0.06 + i * 0.052) +
            's">' +
            display +
            "</span>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
    }

    var headline =
      lang === "es"
        ? headlineEl.getAttribute("data-headline-es")
        : headlineEl.getAttribute("data-headline-en");
    var tagline =
      lang === "es"
        ? taglineEl.getAttribute("data-tagline-es")
        : taglineEl.getAttribute("data-tagline-en");

    animateLetters(headlineEl, headline);
    taglineEl.textContent = tagline;

    splash.hidden = false;
    splash.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
    document.body.classList.add("welcome-active");

    requestAnimationFrame(function () {
      splash.classList.add("is-visible");
      window.setTimeout(function () {
        taglineEl.classList.add("is-visible");
      }, 480);
    });

    window.setTimeout(function () {
      splash.classList.add("is-exiting");
    }, 2400);

    window.setTimeout(function () {
      splash.classList.remove("is-visible", "is-exiting");
      splash.hidden = true;
      splash.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      document.body.classList.remove("welcome-active");
      sessionStorage.setItem("welcome-seen", "1");
    }, 3300);
  }

  initWelcomeSplash();
});
</script>

<style>
#theme-switcher,
#language-switcher {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  margin-left: 0.35rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

#theme-switcher .theme-toggle-btn,
#language-switcher .lang-btn {
  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #d0d7de);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
  font-family: var(--font-ui, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  min-width: 2.35rem;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.62rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
}

#theme-switcher .theme-toggle-btn {
  min-width: 2.5rem;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1;
}

#theme-switcher .theme-toggle-btn:hover,
#language-switcher .lang-btn:hover {
  color: var(--ink, #0f0f14);
  border-color: var(--ink, #0f0f14);
}

#theme-switcher .theme-toggle-btn.is-dark,
#language-switcher .lang-btn.active {
  background: var(--ink, #0f0f14);
  border-color: var(--ink, #0f0f14);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.navbar .nav-item:has(#theme-switcher),
.navbar .nav-item:has(#language-switcher) {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

@media (max-width: 991px) {
  #theme-switcher,
  #language-switcher {
    margin-left: 0;
    margin-top: 0.35rem;
  }
}
</style>
